userText: I gradually awareness of the powers of the AI.
correctedText: I am gradually becoming aware of the power of AI.
generalAdvice: 你把单词和核心意思取回来了，但句子里把 awareness 当成了动词用。这里更自然的是 become aware of，或 build awareness of。

issues.note: awareness 是名词，不能直接放在 I gradually 后面充当动词。
issues.suggestion: 想表达“逐渐意识到”时，优先用 become aware of ...。

issues.note: I gradually awareness of ... 缺少自然的动词骨架。
issues.suggestion: 先套用 I am gradually becoming aware of ... 这个句型。
